chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.080 — Contents of Permit

(a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), a permit under this subchapter must include:

    (1) the name of the applicant;

    (2) the date of issuance;

    (3) the signature of the director of the department;

    (4) a statement of the kind of equipment to be transported over the highway, the weight and dimensions of the equipment, and the kind and weight of each commodity to be transported; and

    (5) a statement of any condition on which the permit is issued.

(b) A permit issued under Section 623.071 (Permit to Move Certain Equipment) (a) or (b) must also state:

    (1) each highway over which the equipment is to be transported, if the permit is for a single trip; or

    (2) the region or area, as required by rule, over which the equipment is to be operated, if the permit is for other than a single trip.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 79, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Except as provided by Subsection (b), a permit under this subchapter must include:
the signature of the director of the department;
a statement of the kind of equipment to be transported over the highway, the weight and dimensions of the equipment, and the kind and weight of each commodity to be transported; and
a statement of any condition on which the permit is issued.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A permit issued under Section 623.071 (Permit to Move Certain Equipment) (a) or (b) must also state:
each highway over which the equipment is to be transported, if the permit is for a single trip; or
the region or area, as required by rule, over which the equipment is to be operated, if the permit is for other than a single trip.
